title: Command manifest (frontmatter)
description: YAML frontmatter contract for commands/ultra-*.md thin-shell files. Phase 3 薄壳化: 命令文件 ≤ 80 行正文，真实 workflow 放 skills/<name>/SKILL.md。additionalProperties=false (PLAN R19).

description.description: 一句话触发描述; 给 runtime 的 skill router / 用户命令列表使用

argument-hint.description: Claude Code convention: hint shown after slash-command name. Both `argument-hint: [foo]` (YAML array form) and `argument-hint: "[foo]"` (string form) are accepted.

allowed-tools.description: Claude Code convention: comma-separated tool allowlist

model.description: Claude Code convention: model routing hint

workflow-ref.description: Phase 3 薄壳关键字段: 指向 skills/<name>/SKILL.md; 存在即表示该命令已迁为薄壳

mcp_tools_required.description: Phase 3+: 命令运行时会调用的 MCP tool 名单; 无 MCP 时走 cli_fallback

cli_fallback.description: Phase 3+: MCP 不可达时回退的 ultra-tools 子命令 (e.g. 'init' -> 'ultra-tools init')
